author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Merge pull request #114 from LaraBug/docs/readme-refresh

Update: rewrite README to match JS SDK style

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Update: rewrite README to match JS SDK style

Drops the Lumen installation section (Lumen is EOL) and the detailed
'reporting unhandled exceptions' walkthrough in favour of a docs link.
Adds a local logo asset, left-aligned. Highlights queue and job
monitoring alongside exception tracking. Cross-links the JS SDK.

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Merge pull request #113 from LaraBug/feature/self-tracking-guards

Add re-entry guards for safe self-tracking

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Add: re-entry guards for safe self-tracking

LaraBug::handle() now maintains a static \$capturing flag, drops any
capture that re-enters while another is in flight, and swallows
capture-internal throwables to error_log instead of rethrowing. Exposes
LaraBug::isCapturing() so the queue tracking path can check the same
state.

JobMonitor::shouldTrack() now skips tracking entirely when a regular
exception capture is in flight, and hard-blocks any job class in the
LaraBug\\\\ namespace. Both guards make it safe to install the SDK inside
the LaraBug SaaS itself without triggering infinite loops.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Fix IDE helper to prevent circular inheritance and class conflicts

- Remove class declarations that override Laravel core classes
- Circular inheritance between PendingDispatch and PendingClosureDispatch was breaking job dispatch
- Keep only LaraBug facade declaration for IDE support
- Prevents conflicts with Laravel's queue system

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Merge pull request #108 from LaraBug/feature/88-dsm-key-config

Add DSN configuration support

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Add DSN configuration support

- Add Support\Dsn class to parse DSN format (https://login-key:project-key@host/path)
- Update ServiceProvider to use DSN when available
- Add 'dsn' config option (LB_DSN) to larabug.php
- DSN takes precedence over individual keys when set
- Falls back to LB_KEY and LB_PROJECT_KEY if DSN not configured

author: Nathan Geerinck

Merge pull request #106 from LaraBug/feature/87-custom-context-data

Add custom context data support for exceptions (#87)

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Make context() and clearContext() static methods

- Change customContext to static property
- Make context() and clearContext() static methods
- Auto-clear context after exception is reported
- Allows static calls via Facade

author: Nathan Geerinck
message: Add methods to Facade

author: Nathan Geerinck
message:
Add custom context data support (Issue #87)

- Add context() method to set custom data on exceptions
- Add clearContext() method to clear custom context
- Automatically include custom context in exception data
- Allows developers to attach contextual data when reporting exceptions
- Useful for external service integrations and debugging
